title: Adderall XR pre-fill pricing
summary: Estimate likely blockers and compare generic stimulant options before the first pharmacy run.

intake.pasted_text:
Case reason: The patient wants likely drug cost, plan blockers, and lower-cost alternatives checked before pickup.

Structured intake details:
Deductible remaining: $1,900 remaining
Out-of-pocket remaining: $5,600 remaining
Quantity / days supply: 30 capsules / 30 days
Preferred pharmacy: CVS retail pharmacy

Patient is before the first fill. They want likely price blockers checked before pickup: prior authorization, step therapy, quantity limits, generic substitution, cash discount pricing, and whether the plan prefers a different stimulant. Compare insurance processing with cash estimates for generic mixed amphetamine salts ER, brand Adderall XR, generic lisdexamfetamine, and methylphenidate ER if the prescriber considers alternatives clinically appropriate.

title: Ozempic before-fill alternatives
summary: Check diagnosis-driven coverage, PA risk, savings routes, and price estimates before the first pharmacy run.

intake.pasted_text:
Case reason: The patient wants likely coverage blockers, public price paths, and clinically reasonable alternatives checked before pickup.

Structured intake details:
Deductible remaining: $1,400 remaining
Out-of-pocket remaining: $5,200 remaining
Quantity / days supply: 1 starter pen / 28 days
Preferred pharmacy: Walgreens retail pharmacy

Patient is before the first fill. Prescriber sent Ozempic starter dose for type 2 diabetes. They want likely coverage blockers checked before pickup: FDA-approved indication fit, prior authorization, step therapy, quantity limits, preferred pharmacy, and whether the plan prefers another diabetes medication. Estimate likely price paths without claiming a live PBM quote: insurance claim, commercial savings card if covered, NovoCare self-pay if coverage is unfavorable, cash discount checks, and lower-cost alternatives for the prescriber to review. Compare Ozempic only with clinically appropriate options such as metformin ER, an SGLT2 inhibitor such as Jardiance or Farxiga, another GLP-1 or incretin therapy such as Trulicity or Mounjaro, and obesity-labeled routes such as Wegovy or Zepbound only if the indication changes. Do not present any alternative as interchangeable without prescriber confirmation.

title: Medicare Enbrel / Wellcare
summary: PA approved, high Part D specialty cost, and Medicare-correct assistance paths.

intake.pasted_text:
Case reason: The patient already has prior authorization approved but received a high Medicare specialty pharmacy quote, so CopayGuard should skip PA troubleshooting and rank Medicare-correct affordability routes.

Structured intake details:
Deductible remaining: $0 remaining
Out-of-pocket remaining: about $2,000 remaining toward the yearly Part D cap
Quantity / days supply: 4 SureClick pens / 28 days
Preferred pharmacy: Wellcare preferred specialty pharmacy
Pharmacy claim status: claim already run through Medicare Part D at the specialty pharmacy
Household income and size for assistance screening: 1-person household, about $50,000 annual income

Pharmacy quote is $2,100 for Enbrel SureClick after the approved prior authorization. Commercial manufacturer copay cards should be treated as blocked because this is Medicare Part D. Rank independent foundation funds, Amgen Safety Net/free-drug screening, Medicare Extra Help/state assistance if eligible, the Medicare Prescription Payment Plan for payment smoothing, and a formulary exception or prescriber-reviewed alternative only if support routes fail.

title: Commercial Enbrel accumulator
summary: Copay support looks helpful today, but plan language suggests deductible credit risk.

intake.plan_name: Employer PPO with specialty pharmacy benefit
intake.pasted_text:
Case reason: The patient used or expected a copay card, but the plan language suggests the discount may not count toward deductible or out-of-pocket progress.

Structured intake details:
Deductible remaining: $2,300 remaining
Out-of-pocket remaining: $6,100 remaining
Quantity / days supply: 4 SureClick pens / 28 days
Preferred pharmacy: Accredo specialty pharmacy
Pharmacy claim status: specialty pharmacy quote shown after benefit and copay support review

Specialty medication copay assistance will not count toward your deductible and will not apply to your out-of-pocket maximum. A variable copay program may apply. Members may be contacted by PrudentRx or SaveOnSP for enrollment. CopayGuard should separate today's low charge from whether the plan credits that support toward the deductible and annual out-of-pocket maximum.

title: Zepbound quote and cash route
summary: High GLP-1 quote with coverage uncertainty, savings-card rules, and cash-pay alternatives.

intake.pasted_text:
Case reason: The patient got a high first-month quote and wants CopayGuard to separate insurance approval, savings-card terms, direct self-pay fallback, and prescriber alternatives.

Structured intake details:
Deductible remaining: $900 remaining
Out-of-pocket remaining: $4,200 remaining
Quantity / days supply: 4 pens / 28 days
Preferred pharmacy: Walmart Pharmacy
Pharmacy claim status: quote is about $550 after savings-card review; plan coverage is still pending

Pharmacy quote is about $550 for the first month after savings-card review. Patient wants to know whether the plan will cover Zepbound, whether LillyDirect or another direct self-pay route is a better fallback, whether the savings card has a monthly cap, and whether a plan exception or therapeutic alternative should be discussed with the prescriber.
